label: Ukrainian Territory Occupied
contestNote: Russia claims annexation of 4 oblasts it does not fully control; Ukraine disputes all Russian territorial claims
deltaNote: Approximate area under Russian occupation as of early 2025

label: Russian Military Casualties (KIA + WIA)
contestNote: Russia does not release official casualty figures. Ukrainian MoD claims higher numbers; independent Russian sources suggest lower.
deltaNote: Approximate rate of ~1,000 casualties per day (KIA + WIA) as of 2025

label: Nuclear Warheads (Total)
deltaNote: Largest nuclear arsenal in the world; modernization program ongoing

label: Russia GDP (Nominal)
deltaNote: War economy growth driven by defense spending; real growth projected at 3.6% for 2025

label: Russia Inflation Rate
deltaNote: High defense spending and labor shortages drive persistent inflation; Central Bank rate held at 21%

label: Sanctions Imposed on Russia
deltaNote: Russia surpassed Iran and North Korea as the world's most sanctioned country in 2022

label: Years Since Kievan Rus Founded
contestNote: Ukraine, Belarus, and Russia all claim descent from Kievan Rus; historians debate continuity with modern Russia

label: Defense Spending (% of GDP)
deltaNote: Russia's 2024 defense budget: ~$109B USD. Largest share of GDP since the early 1990s Soviet collapse.
